ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_subcategory_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the product */,
  "product_sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Model name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product features */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "product_size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "product_style" TEXT /* Style of the product */,
  "product_cost" REAL /* Cost to acquire the product */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "is_taxable" INTEGER /* Whether the product is taxable */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_subcategory_key FOREIGN KEY ("product_subcategory_key") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("product_subcategory_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "product_subcategory_key" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the product subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the product subcategory */,
  "category_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the main category of the subcategory */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the subcategory is active */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the subcategory image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_subcategory_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the vendor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the vendor */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the vendor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the vendor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the vendor is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor supplying the product */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The reorder level for the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the product in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_key FOREIGN KEY ("product_key") REFERENCES products ("product_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the sold product */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount received from the sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the sale */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion applied to the sale */,
  "is_refund" INTEGER /* Whether the sale was refunded */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_key FOREIGN KEY ("product_key") REFERENCES products ("product_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, vendor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Whether the order is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* Message for the gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order it belongs to */,
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the product included in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_key FOREIGN KEY ("product_key") REFERENCES products ("product_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the promotion applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion */,
  "minimum_purchase_amount" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount required for the promotion */,
  "maximum_discount_amount" REAL /* Maximum discount amount allowed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the promotion is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_key FOREIGN KEY ("product_key") REFERENCES products ("product_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_key FOREIGN KEY ("product_key") REFERENCES products ("product_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier handling the shipment */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the shipment */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery */,
  "signature_required" INTEGER /* Whether a signature is required for delivery */,
  "delivery_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of delivery attempts made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shopping cart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the cart */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cart was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cart */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the cart was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cart it belongs to */,
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product added to the cart */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product in the cart */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the product in the cart */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product in the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_product_key FOREIGN KEY ("product_key") REFERENCES products ("product_key")
)
